headline: Research Tools & Consumables Stocks Q4 Results: Benchmarking Revvity (NYSE:RVTY)
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the research tools & consumables industry, including Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) and its peers.
